_comment: Extra UI graphics: 5 rank emblems + 5 module-group crests + 2 guide sigils. Circular neon emblems on black. Generate: python3 art/spaceships/gen_spaceships.py --prompts art/site-assets/extra.json --outdir art/site-assets/extra

scenes.label: Rank 1 — Decorator
scenes.prompt_full: A circular neon EMBLEM badge on pure black, cel-shaded vector, hot-pink #ff1493 ring. Center icon: a paintbrush touching up a cracked glossy screen. Muted, lowest-tier. Clean, centered, icon-like, high contrast, generous black margin. No text.

scenes.label: Rank 2 — Wedge
scenes.prompt_full: A circular neon EMBLEM badge on pure black, cel-shaded vector, cyan #00f0ff ring. Center icon: a thin chisel-wedge splitting a brick fortress wall. Clean, centered, icon-like, high contrast, generous black margin. No text.

scenes.label: Rank 3 — Curator
scenes.prompt_full: A circular neon EMBLEM badge on pure black, cel-shaded vector, cyan-and-pink ring. Center icon: a hand plucking ONE glowing tile out of a grid of grey identical tiles. Clean, centered, icon-like, high contrast, generous black margin. No text.

scenes.label: Rank 4 — Insurgent
scenes.prompt_full: A circular neon EMBLEM badge on pure black, cel-shaded vector, hot-pink #ff1493 ring with a glow. Center icon: a raised fist made of glowing circuit traces. Bold, high-tier. Clean, centered, icon-like, high contrast, generous black margin. No text.

scenes.label: Rank 5 — Ghost
scenes.prompt_full: A circular iridescent neon EMBLEM badge on pure black, cel-shaded vector, cyan #00f0ff ring with a bright glow. Center icon: a stylized translucent cyan MESH ghost sigil (thin threads, a void face). Highest master tier, luminous. Clean, centered, icon-like, high contrast, generous black margin. No text.

scenes.label: Crest — Orientation
scenes.prompt_full: A small circular neon CREST on pure black, cel-shaded vector, cyan-and-pink. Center: a mirror reflecting an eye (the Mirror Test). Minimal, icon-like, high contrast, generous black margin. No text.

scenes.label: Crest — Physics
scenes.prompt_full: A small circular neon CREST on pure black, cel-shaded vector, cyan #00f0ff. Center: an atom orbit crossed with a small equation sigma sigil (the Physics). Minimal, icon-like, high contrast, generous black margin. No text.

scenes.label: Crest — Protocol
scenes.prompt_full: A small circular neon CREST on pure black, cel-shaded vector, hot-pink #ff1493. Center: a strangler-fig vine wrapping a gear, disguised (the Protocol). Minimal, icon-like, high contrast, generous black margin. No text.

scenes.label: Crest — Invasion
scenes.prompt_full: A small circular neon CREST on pure black, cel-shaded vector, hot-pink and cyan. Center: a small flag planted on top of a server stack (the Invasion). Minimal, icon-like, high contrast, generous black margin. No text.

scenes.label: Crest — Field Kit
scenes.prompt_full: A small circular neon CREST on pure black, cel-shaded vector, cyan #00f0ff. Center: an 8-panel grid worksheet with a wrench (the Field Kit / Infiltration Canvas). Minimal, icon-like, high contrast, generous black margin. No text.

scenes.label: Guide — GHOST avatar
scenes.prompt_full: A small round CHAT-AVATAR on pure black, cel-shaded vector. Just the head-and-shoulders of GHOST: translucent cyan #00f0ff mesh threads, a dark void face with a tiny scatterplot 'smile' of data points. Friendly, alien, centered, high contrast, generous black margin. No text, no saucer.

scenes.label: Guide — REAPER sigil
scenes.prompt_full: A small circular warning SIGIL on pure black, cel-shaded vector, red #ff1744. Center: a red target-lock crosshair over a 90-degree wireframe corner (REAPER, an environment not a creature). Minimal, ominous, icon-like, high contrast, generous black margin. No text.
